_description: Injectable configuration for scripts/recalc-fitness.py. Every key here overrides the code default of the same name (same-type values only; wrong-typed or unknown keys are ignored, missing/malformed file falls back to code defaults entirely). Taxonomy tables ship EMPTY on a fresh install: entity/domain names flow in as strings from the producers, so the scorer needs no pre-registered taxonomy. Populate lens_defaults / lens_cognitive_modes / trait_defaults if you add lens or trait producers with known repertoires.
